case_title: TATTAN TIMOTHY S. VS TURRENTINE TERRY DBA BROWNING GRACE COMMUNICATIONS et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TURRENTINE TERRY DBA BROWNING GRACE COMMUNICATIONS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TATTAN TIMOTHY S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TURRENTINE TERRY DBA BROWNING GRACE COMMUNICATIONS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
